app.title: AMD Boot Camp Driver Studio
app.subtitle: Profile-driven driver preparation, installation, and recovery
overview.heading: System overview
overview.profileDetail: Profiles are validated JSON files and can be added without rebuilding the app.
overview.driverBasis: This compatibility profile adapts the Radeon RX 5500M driver family for the Boot Camp Radeon Pro 5500M.
package.heading: Package verification
package.description: Choose C:\AMD or an official extraction folder. Display and Display2 are discovered automatically before SHA-256 and hardware checks.
prepare.heading: Prepare patched package
prepare.description: The source is copied, patched through the selected profile, cataloged, and locally signed. The original package is never modified.
prepare.consent: I understand that this adds a locally trusted certificate and requires Windows test-signing mode.
install.heading: Install and protect
install.description: A backup is created before the active graphics driver is replaced.
install.blockWu: Block driver updates through Windows Update
install.blockAdrenalin: Disable Adrenalin update checks and alerts
backups.heading: Driver backups
backups.description: Restore a previously exported signed driver if the patched package fails.
logs.heading: Operation log
logs.description: Detailed audit, patch, signing, and installation events.
downloads.heading: Official AMD driver downloads
downloads.description: Download from the official AMD domain and verify the installer against the profile SHA-256.
downloads.unifiedPackage: AMD currently uses the same unified installer URL for Windows 10 and Windows 11. It is validated for both systems despite win11 appearing in the filename.
downloads.driverBasis: The patch uses the Radeon RX 5500M driver family in the official package and adds Radeon Pro 5500M Boot Camp compatibility.
settings.heading: Settings
settings.description: Choose the interface language and recommended default behavior.
settings.setupGuide: Designed for a clean Windows installation with no AMD driver: download, extract to C:\AMD, detect, prepare and create the certificate, enable test-signing, then install.
message.prepareSuccess: The patched package was prepared and signed.
message.testModeSuccess: Test-signing mode is configured for the next boot.
message.installSuccess: Driver installation completed. Restart Windows. Backup:
message.downloadSuccess: The official AMD installer was downloaded and its SHA-256 was verified.
message.reusedInstaller: The existing installer was reused after its SHA-256 was verified.
message.extractorStarted: The AMD installer was started. Finish extraction to C:\AMD, then detect the package.
message.packageNotFound: No extracted package for the selected version was found below C:\AMD.
message.packageDetected: The extracted AMD package was found and its SHA-256 verification passed.
message.packageNotValid: Package candidates were found, but none matched the selected profile. Check the log below.
message.defaultsApplied: Recommended Windows Update and Adrenalin defaults were applied.
message.detachedInstallStarting: The app will close before the display-driver swap to prevent a WinUI blackout. It will reopen automatically after installation and display recovery.
message.consentRequired: Accept the security warning before continuing.
dialog.installBody: The current driver will be backed up and replaced. To avoid a WinUI blackout, the app closes first and reopens about 10 seconds after the display flickers. Installation progress will appear in the bottom log after relaunch.
dialog.restoreBody: The current driver will be removed and the selected signed backup will be installed.
